training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.representation: cached official AIDO+GNN perturbation features from parent root
pipeline_program.perturbation_side: parent-preserved dense context branch over official cached embeddings
pipeline_program.target_side: STRING_GNN node embeddings fused with AIDO.Cell-100M gene vocabulary/order features
pipeline_program.fusion: gated low-rank bilinear fusion residual added to parent dense logits
pipeline_program.head: parent dense all-target head plus AIDO/STRING target-artifact fusion residual
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: AIDO perturbation/cell representation fused with STRING_GNN target-side representation
